wall.title: Your Wall
wall.subtitle: Provide a clear photo of the wall where you'd like to hang the artwork.

errors.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.tooLarge: Image is very large and will be compressed.

painting.title: The Artwork
painting.subtitle: Upload a photo of the painting you'd like to place on your wall.
painting.dragDrop: Drag and drop or click to browse

notes.title: Photography Notes
notes.planar: Shoot the painting head-on to avoid trapezoid distortion.
notes.exposure: Use neutral exposure — avoid heavy filters.
notes.edge: If the painting has raw edges, photograph against a high-contrast background.

errors.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.tooLarge: Image is very large and will be compressed.

crop.title: Crop the Painting
crop.subtitle: Crop tightly around the full outer edge of the piece you want to place on the wall.
crop.instruction: Drag the corners to adjust the crop area.
crop.perspectiveInstruction: Drag the corners to outline the painting edges.

placement.title: Place on Wall
placement.subtitle: Drag, resize, and rotate the painting to position it on your wall.
placement.perspSubtitle: Drag corners to adjust perspective. Drag inside the painting to move it.

calibration.instruction: Tap two points on the same wall surface

wallDefine.title: Match Wall
wallDefine.instruction: Drag the corners to outline the wall surface.

perspective.title: Adjust Corners
perspective.subtitle: Drag each corner independently to match the perspective of your wall.

render.title: Your Artwork is Ready
render.subtitle: Review the final composition and download your image.
